the flavor of artificial banana doesn't exactly match the taste of real bananas because it's based on an older variety of banana that was more common in the past. This older variety, the Gros Michel banana, had a different flavor profile compared to the Cavendish bananas that dominate the market today. So, when you taste artificial banana flavoring, you're experiencing a representation of an older banana taste
